TC-S5-006-01.description: Document with only original render, verify displays as normal file (no expansion)

TC-S5-006-02.description: Anonymize document, verify document converts to expandable container with 2 renders

TC-S5-006-03.description: Click expand chevron, verify renders list shows 'Original' and 'Anonymized'

TC-S5-006-04.description: Click 'Anonymized' render, verify DocumentViewer displays anonymized version

TC-S5-006-05.description: Translate document to German, verify third render 'German Translation' appears

TC-S5-006-06.description: Badge shows '3 renders' when document has 3 renders

TC-S5-006-07.description: Click delete icon on anonymized render, verify confirmation dialog appears

TC-S5-006-08.description: Confirm delete render, verify render removed from list and file deleted

TC-S5-006-09.description: Delete all renders except original, verify document reverts to normal file display

TC-S5-006-10.description: Verify original render cannot be deleted (no delete button)

TC-S5-006-11.description: Create multiple translations (German, English, French), verify all listed under parent

TC-S5-006-12.description: Refresh page, verify render structure persists (loaded from metadata)

TC-S5-006-13.description: Render icons display correctly (EyeOff for anonymized, Globe for translated)

TC-S5-006-14.description: Collapse expanded document, verify renders hidden but selection maintained
